summary: Added a light temporal bridge into the chapter opening and sharpened the closing handoff back to the Bebop so the pre-dawn start of chapter 9 lands more cleanly.
edits: Added a small opening time anchor for smoother carryover from chapter 7.
Specified red dust in the alley to echo the residue that follows Spike onto the ship.
Changed the final line to point explicitly back to the Bebop.
